nasb.text: And following Him was a large crowd of the people, and of women who were mourning and lamenting Him.

esv.text: And there followed him a great multitude of the people and of women who were mourning and lamenting for him.

cnv.text: 一大群人跟隨他，有些婦女為他捶胸痛哭。

ccb.text: 有一大群人跟在耶稣后面，其中有不少妇女为耶稣伤心痛哭。

csbs.text: 有一大群人跟着耶稣，其中有些妇女为他捶胸哀哭。
